_comment: MCP servers give Claude access to external tools (GitHub, DB, Datadog).
All credentials come from environment variables — never hardcode values here.
Add this file to git; secrets are injected at runtime via env.
Each server is a local npx process — no data leaves your machine except
through the server's own API calls to the named service.

github._comment: Gives Claude read/write access to GitHub: PRs, issues, branches, code search. Set GITHUB_TOKEN to a PAT with repo scope.

postgres._comment: Gives Claude read access to your database schema and data. Use a read-only role for DATABASE_URL in production — never a superuser.

datadog._comment: Gives Claude access to Datadog metrics, logs, and monitors. DD_SITE: 'datadoghq.com' (US) or 'datadoghq.eu' (EU).
